# Pull Request

## Description

Provide a brief summary of the changes introduced by this Pull Request.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have written unit or integration tests covering my changes (TDD norm).
- [ ] All tests are passing locally (`uv run pytest`).
- [ ] Code is formatted and linted locally (`uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format .`).
- [ ] Type checks pass locally (`uv run mypy`).
- [ ] The PR title follows Conventional Commits format (e.g., `feat: ...`, `fix: ...`, `chore: ...`).
- [ ] I have linked any relevant issues in the description below (e.g., `Closes #123`).
